name: CodeCrafters
description: CodeCrafters — advanced programming challenges platform where developers build their own Redis, Git, HTTP server, and SQLite from scratch.

seo.title: CodeCrafters — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: CodeCrafters: CodeCrafters — advanced programming challenges platform where developers build their own Redis, Git, HTTP server, and SQLite from scratch.

when_to_use: Build a Git clone from scratch to understand internals
Implement Redis protocol server in a new language to learn it
HTTP/1.1 server challenge used as backend interview prep
SQLite parser challenge deepening database internals knowledge
Kafka implementation challenge for distributed systems study

pros: Build-real-tools projects beat typical coding puzzles
Git-based workflow mirrors real engineering practice
Wide language support for each challenge
cons: Subscription pricing is premium for hobbyist learners
Assumes solid fundamentals, not a starter platform
Challenges can bottleneck on specific stage bugs
No formal credential or certification outcome
review.verdict: The best deep-skills platform for intermediate devs; pricing and difficulty make it a poor beginner fit.
review.best_for: Intermediate-to-senior devs wanting to deeply understand Redis, Git, or HTTP by rebuilding them.
review.not_for: Beginners, bootcamp students, or devs chasing a credential instead of deep understanding.
